title: `/api/jam` never returns a joinable Jam link, only a normal track share URL
reasoning: The documented product intent is a "listen with me" jam link, but this handler always converts the current track URI into `https://open.spotify.com/track/...`. That URL opens the track page; it does not join a Spotify Jam session. Any caller treating this endpoint as a Jam-link provider will get the wrong behavior even when music is currently playing.
recommendation: Either implement a real Jam/session URL flow, or change the endpoint name/response contract so callers do not assume it returns a joinable Jam link.
whyTestsDoNotAlreadyCoverThis: No tests are included for this route, so nothing asserts that the returned URL matches the advertised Jam behavior.
suggestedRegressionTest: Add a route test that mocks a playing track and asserts the response contract: either a real Jam URL shape if that is the intended feature, or a renamed/share-url field if the endpoint is only a fallback track link.
